name: Bandit Captain
description: The one who gives the orders. Better armed, better trained, and with something to prove.

sensory.sight: better armor than the rest, a weapon that's been maintained, eyes that measure you
sensory.sound: commands barked in a voice used to being obeyed
sensory.smell: leather, oil, the faint sweetness of wine
sensory.feel: this one's different — there's competence behind the threat

encounter_hooks: a wanted poster in the last town, with a surprisingly good likeness
the bandits defer to someone who hasn't shown themselves yet
a former guard's tabard, turned inside out, worn under a stolen cloak
notes: Bandit captains have histories. Ex-soldiers, fallen merchants, disgraced guards. Their backstory is the interesting part. Some can be recruited. Some should be brought to justice.
